title: ochthocosmus longipedicellatus
intro: Ochthocosmus longipedicellatus, also known as the Long-peduncled Ochthocosmus, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues.
